language.label: Interface language
language.description: The language the app is displayed in.

modal.transcriptionSetupTitle: Speech recognition needs to be set up

parakeet.title: Language support in Parakeet
parakeet.desc: Parakeet currently supports only automatic language detection. Manual language selection is unavailable. Use Whisper if you need to specify a particular language.

autoWarning.title: Auto-detect may produce incorrect results
autoWarning.desc: For best accuracy, choose a specific language (e.g. English, Spanish, etc.)

translate.title: Translation mode is active
translate.desc: All audio will be automatically translated to English. Suitable for multilingual meetings when you need the result in English.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Show notifications when recording starts and stops

export.title: Export summary to Markdown
export.desc: Folder where .md files are saved when exporting a meeting summary.
